name: P2P File Share

notes.en: Drag a file in or tap Choose file. Tap a room member (or Send to everyone) to transfer it.

multiplayer.notes: WebRTC DataChannel file transfer; ogh-net WebSocket room relay used only for SDP/ICE signaling

notes: No STUN/TURN configured — peers on the same LAN room connect with host ICE candidates only. File bytes never pass through the host.
